response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and software practices
Demonstrated ability to own and ship complex, distributed systems (e.g., GIS platform)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems in a production cloud context
Lacks formal technical leadership experience mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
